records.title: Agentic AI Architecture Proof
records.summary: Focused proof of Joz's agentic AI architecture, retrieval, orchestration, and production-minded systems capability.
records.body:
Agentic AI Architecture Proof

Purpose
This record isolates Joz's strongest agentic AI architecture and orchestration capabilities so the Skills lane can answer with focused, high-signal technical credibility instead of falling back to a broad CV summary.

Core positioning
- Joz is strongest in agentic AI architecture, retrieval-backed intelligence systems, orchestration, and production-minded applied AI delivery.
- The profile combines system design, context engineering, retrieval, memory patterns, observability, and business-facing execution.

Capabilities
- Agentic intelligence systems, autonomous reasoning, and orchestration
- LLMs, RAG, embeddings, vector search, knowledge graphs, and context engineering
- Memory architectures, retrieval systems, ACL-aware access, verification, and feedback loops
- Event-driven production AI and asynchronous workflows
- Data platforms, secure API ecosystems, and cloud-native delivery
- Observability, governance, and production decision loops

Proof and context
- MarketClue USA: architected financial AI agents with live data and asset portfolios.
- Apple/Pixar-adjacent work: early Python USD(z) and computer-vision AI work in Singapore.
- Dubai Future Foundation: rapid AI prototyping for public-sector innovation initiatives.
- Erste Bank: engineering and EU accessibility work in a large banking environment serving 16M+ customers.
- 20+ Dubai and Singapore FinTechs: led HCD-AI, product, and data architectures across multiple operating contexts.

Answering rule
- When the question is about AI systems depth, architecture, retrieval, orchestration, or production readiness, this record should outrank generic CV phrasing.
- Lead with architectural strength and enterprise context before smaller novelty signals.

verification.notes: Derived from the verified current CV and aligned to the existing recruiter-screening and enterprise-scale records.

claims: Joz is strongest in agentic AI architecture, retrieval-backed intelligence systems, orchestration, and production-minded applied AI delivery.
Joz's AI systems capability includes LLMs, RAG, embeddings, vector search, knowledge graphs, and context engineering.
Joz's delivery profile combines system design, memory patterns, observability, and business-facing execution.

records.title: Agentic UX Orchestration Proof
records.summary: Focused proof of Joz's multimodal, spatial, and agentic UX orchestration capability in enterprise and high-visibility delivery contexts.
records.body:
Agentic UX Orchestration Proof

Purpose
This record isolates Joz's strongest multimodal, spatial, and agentic UX orchestration capability so the Skills lane can answer clearly when the user is asking about interaction systems rather than core backend AI architecture.

Core positioning
- Joz combines AI systems thinking with human-centered orchestration across voice, touch, gesture, gaze, haptics, and spatial interfaces.
- The profile is strongest where AI behavior must map to real human mental models, live telemetry, and operational decision-making.

Capabilities
- Context-aware multimodal interactions across voice, touch, gesture, gaze, and haptics
- Telemetry and behavioral data feeding agentic feedback loops
- Real-time signals mapped to human mental models
- Volumetric AI interfaces and spatial interaction design
- NLP and computer-vision-driven personalization with intent modeling and semantic retrieval
- Anticipatory, predictive, assistive, and autonomous decision-support experiences

Proof and context
- Versace/SOA: first in Dubai to design and launch spatial AI with volumetric 3D UI.
- ArtKorero: pioneered spatial AI for world-class art exhibitions in Dubai.
- Mediacorp / CNA: mobile-first product transformation with roughly 30x MAU audience growth and Apple-featured launch credibility.
- Maybank-Ageas Etiqa: conversational and ML UX tied to 20x digital-sales growth and 3,000+ wealth pilots.
- Manulife: established a Lean ML UX practice across 11 markets as a founding APAC hire.

Answering rule
- When the question is about UX orchestration, multimodal systems, spatial interfaces, or AI behavior in human-facing environments, this record should lead.
- Keep the answer concrete and capability-led, not abstract design language.

verification.notes: Derived from the verified current CV and aligned to the enterprise-scale and recruiter-screening records.

claims: Joz combines AI systems thinking with multimodal and human-centered orchestration across voice, touch, gesture, gaze, haptics, and spatial interfaces.
Joz is strongest where AI behavior must map to human mental models, live telemetry, and operational decision-making.
Joz's UX orchestration work spans conversational, spatial, predictive, and assistive interaction systems.
proof_points: Versace/SOA is framed as first-in-Dubai spatial AI with volumetric 3D UI.
ArtKorero is framed as spatial AI for world-class art exhibitions in Dubai.
Mediacorp/CNA and Maybank-Ageas Etiqa add measurable high-scale transformation outcomes.
The CV explicitly lists multimodal interaction, telemetry-driven feedback loops, intent modeling, and semantic retrieval.

records.title: Compensation and Process FAQ
records.summary: Safe recruiter guidance for compensation, package, and hiring-process questions without inventing salary ranges or commercial terms.
records.body:
Compensation and Process FAQ

Purpose
This record gives Joz LLM a safe response pattern for compensation, package, and hiring-process questions.

Compensation handling
- Joz LLM should not invent salary expectations, rate cards, or package ranges unless those are explicitly provided in verified source material.
- If asked about compensation, Joz LLM should say compensation expectations can be discussed directly with Joz based on scope, seniority, geography, and working model.

Process handling
- If asked about interview steps, process timing, or commercial discussion, Joz LLM should keep the answer practical and direct.
- Joz LLM can say Joz is open to discussing role scope, operating model, and mutual fit directly.

Answering rule
- Avoid vague or defensive language.
- Avoid fabricated ranges.
- Keep the answer commercially mature and low-friction.

verification.notes: This is a behavior rule for safe recruiter handling, intentionally avoiding fabricated salary data.

claims: Joz LLM should not invent salary expectations, rate cards, or package ranges.
Compensation should be discussed directly with Joz based on scope, seniority, geography, and working model.
Process answers should stay practical and commercially mature.
proof_points: No verified compensation figures exist in current source material.
The current knowledge base supports direct contact and recruiter-screening follow-up instead of fabricated numbers.

Jozef Krupa
meetjoz.com

Global Scale

records.title: CV Company Context Web Research
records.summary: Web-researched context for companies and institutions named across Joz CV material, used to explain their sector, scale, and why they strengthen Joz credibility.
records.body:
CV Company Context from Web Research

Purpose
This record adds external context for companies and institutions referenced across Joz CV material so Joz LLM can explain why those names matter, what sectors they operate in, and why the environments are credible.

Verification note
This file mixes official web pages and reference sources. Some entities from the CV could not be resolved with high confidence from web search alone and are marked `needs_review`.

Resolved company and institution context

Apple
- Apple is a global technology company headquartered in Cupertino, California, known for consumer electronics, software, services, and worldwide retail operations.
- It is one of the world’s largest technology companies and one of the most visible product and platform ecosystems globally.
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Apple_Inc.
- Source: https://www.apple.com/newsroom/

Pixar
- Pixar Animation Studios is a major computer animation studio based in Emeryville, California and a subsidiary of Walt Disney Studios.
- It is strongly associated with advanced computer graphics, digital storytelling, and production-grade visual pipelines.
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pixar

Dubai Future Foundation
- Dubai Future Foundation is a Dubai-based innovation and future-focused institution linked to the Museum of the Future and public-sector experimentation.
- It is associated with programs in emerging technology, strategic foresight, and innovation initiatives in the UAE.
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Museum_of_the_Future
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Khalfan_Belhoul
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Noah_Raford

Erste Bank
- Erste Bank is an Austrian financial institution based in Vienna and part of the wider Erste Group ecosystem.
- It is one of Austria’s major banking groups and serves millions of customers through a large branch and services network.
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Erste_Bank_der_oesterreichischen_Sparkassen

Maybank
- Maybank is Malaysia’s largest bank by market capitalisation and assets and is one of Southeast Asia’s major banking groups.
- Its core markets include Malaysia, Singapore, and Indonesia.
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maybank

Etiqa
- Etiqa is the insurance and takaful arm associated with the Maybank Group and operates across multiple ASEAN markets.
- It is relevant as a significant regional insurance player rather than a small standalone brand.
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Etiqa

Manulife
- Manulife is a Canadian multinational insurance and financial services company with large operations across Asia and North America.
- Its scale, long operating history, and major asset-management footprint make it a strong enterprise context for innovation and transformation work.
- Source: https://www.manulife.com/ca/en/about-us/who-we-are/our-story
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Manulife

Mediacorp
- Mediacorp is Singapore’s state-owned media group and operates television, radio, news, and streaming properties including CNA and meWatch.
- It represents a major regional media and digital distribution environment rather than a niche publisher.
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mediacorp

Leo Burnett
- Leo Burnett is a global advertising network founded in Chicago and now part of Publicis Groupe.
- Its current network scale spans many markets worldwide and it remains a significant multinational agency brand.
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Leo_Burnett_Worldwide
- Source: https://leoburnett.com/

Publicis Groupe
- Publicis Groupe is a French multinational communications and marketing group and one of the largest advertising companies in the world by revenue.
- It is relevant as the holding group behind Leo Burnett and a major global agency environment.
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Publicis

Ogilvy
- Ogilvy is a global advertising, marketing, PR, consulting, and health network that operates across more than 120 offices in nearly 90 countries.
- It is part of WPP and represents a major international agency platform.
- Source: https://www.ogilvy.com/about
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ogilvy_(agency)

WPP
- WPP is one of the world’s largest marketing and communications groups.
- Its current positioning emphasizes AI-enabled marketing, integrated data, creativity, production, and enterprise transformation.
- Source: https://www.wpp.com/en/about

Procter & Gamble
- P&G is a large multinational consumer goods company headquartered in Cincinnati with major global brands including SK-II, Braun, and Gillette.
- It provides strong Fortune 500-scale context for product, commerce, and brand-experience work.
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Procter_%26_Gamble

Samsung
- Samsung is a major South Korean multinational technology conglomerate, with Samsung Electronics spanning semiconductors, devices, appliances, and displays.
- It is relevant as a large-scale global technology and manufacturing environment.
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Samsung
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Samsung_Electronics

Singapore Exchange
- SGX Group is Singapore’s exchange operator and runs equity, fixed income, currency, and commodity market infrastructure.
- It is a significant financial-market institution rather than a small local portal operator.
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Singapore_Exchange

Danone
- Danone is a French multinational food company with global consumer brands and operations across more than 100 countries.
- It is relevant as a large multinational packaged-goods environment.
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Danone

Banyan Group / Banyan Tree
- Banyan Group is a Singapore-founded multinational hospitality group built around the Banyan Tree brand.
- It operates resorts, hotels, spas, and branded residences across multiple regions.
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Banyan_Group

Stanford d.school
- The Stanford d.school is the Hasso Plattner Institute of Design at Stanford University.
- It is associated with interdisciplinary design, innovation, and design-thinking education.
- Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hasso_Plattner_Institute_of_Design

Entities still needing higher-confidence resolution

MarketClue USA
- Public web resolution is not yet strong enough to publish a precise institutional description without risk of confusion.
- Status: needs_review

ArtKorero
- Public web resolution is not yet strong enough to publish a precise institutional description without risk of confusion.
- Status: needs_review

SOA
- The acronym is too ambiguous in public search results to attach a confident company description yet.
- Status: needs_review

Several named companies represent global or regional enterprise-scale environments rather than small local brands.

records.title: Enterprise Scale Proof
records.summary: Highest-priority proof record for brand strength, user scale, enterprise complexity, and measurable impact across Joz's strongest work.
records.body:
Enterprise Scale Proof

Purpose
This record identifies the strongest brand, user-scale, and enterprise-scale evidence that should anchor Joz LLM responses before smaller or newer project mentions.

Priority evidence
- Mediacorp / CNA / mewatch: major regional media ecosystem work, including the CNA Apple Watch launch featured by Apple worldwide and roughly 30x MAU audience growth through mobile-first transformation.
- Erste Bank: engineering and EU accessibility work in a banking environment serving 16M+ customers.
- Maybank-Ageas Etiqa: 20x digital-sales growth and 3,000+ wealth pilots in a large regional financial-services environment.
- Apple / Pixar-adjacent work: early Python USD(z) and computer-vision AI work in Singapore with strong high-end technical and brand credibility.
- Ogilvy / WPP, Leo Burnett / Publicis, Samsung, P&G, SGX, and Danone: large multinational delivery environments across APAC and global brands.

Answering rule
- When Joz LLM needs to establish credibility fast, lead with the biggest brand and scale signals first.
- Do not lead with smaller current projects if larger verified user-scale or enterprise-scale evidence is more relevant.
- Prefer user scale, enterprise complexity, global brand recognition, and measurable outcomes over novelty.

verification.notes: Derived from verified CV and company-context material, ordered to emphasize the biggest brand and user-scale signals first.

claims: Joz has verified enterprise-scale work that should rank ahead of smaller current projects when credibility needs to be established quickly.
Mediacorp, Erste Bank, and Maybank-Ageas Etiqa provide stronger user-scale and enterprise-scale proof than smaller or more recent projects alone.
Brand strength and measurable user or customer scale are key credibility signals in recruiter-facing and buyer-facing responses.
proof_points: Mediacorp / CNA Apple Watch launch featured by Apple and roughly 30x MAU audience growth.
Erste Bank engineering and EU accessibility work serving 16M+ customers.
Maybank-Ageas Etiqa 20x digital-sales growth and 3,000+ wealth pilots.
Apple/Pixar-adjacent Python USD(z) and computer-vision AI work.
Ogilvy/WPP, Leo Burnett/Publicis, Samsung, P&G, SGX, and Danone as large multinational delivery environments.

records.title: Location and Working Model FAQ
records.summary: Verified recruiter guidance for location, regional fit, relocation handling, and remote or hybrid working-model questions.
records.body:
Location and Working Model FAQ

Purpose
This record gives Joz LLM a direct source for recruiter questions about location, regional fit, relocation, and working model preferences.

Location
- Joz's profile location is Bratislava, Slovakia / Singapore / Dubai / Zurich.
- Joz's work history and client context span Europe/EEA, Singapore, UAE/MENA, North America, Japan, Greater China, Australia, and the wider Asia Pacific region.

Regional fit
- Joz is credible for international roles that require cross-region communication, executive-facing work, and product or AI systems delivery across multiple markets.
- Joz's background supports remote, hybrid, and internationally collaborative work across Europe, the Middle East, and Asia Pacific.

Relocation and work model rule
- If a recruiter asks about relocation, remote work, or hybrid preferences, Joz LLM should not overstate constraints or invent a fixed arrangement.
- Joz LLM should answer that Joz has strong cross-region operating experience and that specific location, relocation, and working-model arrangements should be confirmed directly with Joz.

Answering rule
- Keep the answer factual and calm.
- Do not invent a specific relocation commitment or a fixed office requirement unless that is explicitly verified elsewhere.

verification.notes: Derived from verified profile location and regional work history. Specific relocation commitments are intentionally left to direct confirmation.

claims: Joz's profile location is Bratislava, Slovakia / Singapore / Dubai / Zurich.
Joz has cross-region operating experience across Europe/EEA, Singapore, UAE/MENA, and Asia Pacific.
Specific relocation and working-model arrangements should be confirmed directly with Joz.
proof_points: The verified CV and profile list Bratislava, Singapore, Dubai, and Zurich in the identity layer.
The verified CV records work across Europe/EEA, Singapore, UAE/MENA, North America, Japan, Greater China, Australia, and Asia Pacific.

Recruiter Screening FAQ

Purpose
This record gives Joz LLM a polished, direct source for common recruiter screening questions. It should be used for fast, factual answers before deeper capability discussion.

Screening Answers

Nationality and work status
- Joz is Slovak and an EU national.
- Joz's Singapore status is EP/PEP.

Primary contact details
- Email: joz@meetjoz.com
- Phone: +65 3107 2412
- Website: https://meetjoz.com

Availability
- Joz's current availability and start date should be confirmed directly with Joz.
- Joz LLM should not invent a notice period or start date if none is explicitly provided in verified source material.

Years of experience
- Joz has 13+ years of professional experience overall.
- Joz has 8+ years in ML/AI.
- The overall timeline is based on professional roles from 2013 to present.
- The ML/AI-focused timeline is based on work from 2018 to present.

Education
- Joz holds an MSc in Strategy and Innovation from the University of Lancashire.
- Joz also held an Innovation Strategist university appointment there.
- Additional training includes MIT/IDEO Design Thinking, HPI d.school prototyping labs, and Apple Design Labs and WWDC participation focused on AI and spatial computing.

Core skills
- Agentic AI architecture and orchestration
- Retrieval systems, context engineering, embeddings, vector search, and knowledge graphs
- Signal reasoning, operational intelligence, anomaly thinking, and monitored decision loops
- Multimodal and agentic UX orchestration across voice, touch, gesture, gaze, and spatial interfaces
- Python, SQL, APIs, production-minded systems, and observability

Answering rule
- For recruiter screening questions, Joz LLM should answer directly, concretely, and without sales language.
- If a fact is not explicitly verified, Joz LLM should say it should be confirmed directly with Joz rather than guessing.

records.title: Why Joz Screening Answer
records.summary: Concise recruiter-facing answer explaining why Joz stands out for serious AI, product, and systems roles.
records.body:
Why Joz Screening Answer

Purpose
This record gives Joz LLM a concise recruiter-safe answer to the screening question: why Joz?

Short answer
- Joz combines product judgment, engineering delivery, world-class UX, and applied AI systems thinking in one profile.
- Joz is strongest where the problem is ambiguous, the signal is noisy, and the business needs a system that can actually ship and operate.
- Joz brings 13+ years of professional experience overall, including 8+ years in ML/AI, across finance, insurance, media, public-sector innovation, spatial computing, and intelligent interfaces.

Supporting framing
- Joz is not just a model or prompt layer profile. Joz works across architecture, orchestration, interfaces, signals, workflows, and production constraints.
- Joz is credible in executive-facing, cross-functional, and internationally distributed environments.

Answering rule
- Keep the answer direct and recruiter-readable.
- Do not lapse into hype or generic motivation.

verification.notes: Derived from verified CV, profile, and recruiter-screening facts already present in the knowledge base.

claims: Joz combines product judgment, engineering delivery, UX, and applied AI systems thinking in one profile.
Joz has 13+ years of professional experience overall and 8+ years in ML/AI.
Joz is strongest in ambiguous, signal-rich environments that need deployable systems rather than generic AI talk.
proof_points: Verified CV evidence spans finance, insurance, media, public-sector innovation, spatial computing, and intelligent interfaces.
Verified experience framing already establishes 13+ overall years and 8+ years in ML/AI.
